* 4b04431d1ba1210d4bc532f84bb7ce09371f1c45 feat: add auth login/logout/status commands with browser flow
* 0b1aae1e47a67258f1a42395f14bf1cf4af89d02 feat: add config get/set/list commands
* 3fe8f659ed2f27ee563e0785014f2f2b2f739c97 feat: add config module for token, account, and API URL management

* e1274b38661ea7384ee8da8bbf5d27bf15d752d0 feat: add shell completion generation command
* 94dde77167a0d19ba7cafc032313059d4df4d8c0 feat: add version command

* 2dd82a783e555304eeaaccee20cf1be02585987d fix: update module path to match GitHub org (artisanscompany)
